name: Crunchy Granola
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F.
2. Mix all ingredients together using an electric mixer until combined.
3. Spread the mixture evenly on two baking sheets with edges.
4. Bake for 45-60 minutes, or until golden brown.
5. Turn and stir after 30 minutes of baking.
6. Remove from the oven and add the reserved raisins.
7. Allow to cool completely before storing in a plastic bag.
8. This recipe makes approximately 5 1/2 cups of granola.
Note: Approximately 3/4 teaspoon of honey (12 calories) is added per serving.
